summary: Integrated the Telemetry Event Contract validator into the Cloudflare hosted receiver before projection storage. The receiver now accepts current SiteEventEnvelope compatibility events and future telemetry contract-shaped events, normalizes them to the existing projection path, and distinguishes contract validation refusals from bearer capability failures.
residuals: No live Cloudflare deployment or publishing was performed.
Publication Edge runtime config/preflight remains for later Publication Edge tasks.
The hosted receiver still stores normalized SiteEventEnvelope-shaped projection records; preserving future contract fields in audit/projection storage remains later work if needed.
